summary:
The available literature lacks specific data on treadmill testing outcomes for children with spina bifida regarding peak vs. maximum oxygen uptake. Due to insufficient evidence, it remains uncertain if peak oxygen uptake accurately represents maximum oxygen uptake in these patients. 

Note: Do not include any commentary beyond what was stated by Agent2; do not add external knowledge or interpretation.
